docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-09-1991, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-21-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OSTROFF JAMES HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZANTO PETER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OSTROFF JAMES PLTF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $220.00 FILED BY SZANTO PETER AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZANTO PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSTROFF JAMES $220.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $260.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
